---
title: "cstar.ts"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/cstar.ts"
loc: 270
complexity: 32
logic_score: 1.00
style_score: 3.80
intel_score: 2.88
overall_score: 2.56
---

## Intent
A functional component of the Corvus Star static analysis matrix. It exists to support the broader ecosystem of system telemetry. Its role in the system is to provide foundational operational logic.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 1.0/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 2.9/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 5 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [Command](file://commander)
- [*](file://chalk)
- [*](file://node:fs)
- [fileURLToPath](file://node:url)
- [join](file://node:path)
- [parse](file://node:path)
- [execa](file://execa)
- [CortexLink](file://./src/node/cortex_link.js)
- [executeCycle](file://./src/node/agent_loop.js)
- [runStartupCeremony](file://./src/node/ceremony.js)

### Exports
- `__dirname`
- `PROJECT_ROOT`
- `pkgPath`
- `pkg`
- `isHelpOrVersion`
- `isGeminiMode`
- `program`
- `handleError`
- `cleanMsg`
- `link`
- `pythonPath`
- `dormancyScript`
- `pythonPath`
- `learnScript`
- `muninnPidPath`
- `muninnStatus`
- `pid`
- `envPath`
- `envContent`
- `isSet`
- `wardenDir`
- `active_wardens`
- `displayWardens`
- `i`
- `w1`
- `w2`
- `pennyoneBin`
- `searchScript`
- `analyticsScript`
- `scanPath`
- `discoverAll`
- `commands`
- `scriptDirs`
- `name`
- `workflowDir`
- `name`
- `cmd`
- `allCmds`
- `pythonPath`
- `dispatcherPath`
